input.command:
[Console]::OutputEncoding = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8
$ip='26.41.66.35'
$sec=ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred=New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8',$sec)
$session = New-PSSession -ComputerName $ip -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate
Invoke-Command -Session $session -ScriptBlock {
  function L($m){ Write-Output "[$(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss')] $m" }
  $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'
  function Write-AsciiNoBom($path,$text){ [IO.File]::WriteAllText($path,$text,[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)) }

  # Try plain and base64 CIS variants - look at what worked in log at 10:22:17
  # That request used token admin and got CDN response. CIS was mangled because of short string.
  # Proper CIS example for food: 01 + 14 digits GTIN + 21 + serial (variable) + GS + 93 + crypto
  # Use ASCII GS = \u001d
  $gs = [char]29
  $cisPlain = "010460706333805621ABCDEFG${gs}93dGVzdA=="
  $cisB64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($cisPlain))
  # Also try without GS
  $cis2 = '010460706333805621ABCDEFG93ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOP'
  $cis2b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($cis2))

  $id=[guid]::NewGuid().ToString()
  foreach($pair in @(
    @{label='plain'; code=$cis2},
    @{label='b64'; code=$cis2b64},
    @{label='plainGS'; code=$cisPlain},
    @{label='b64GS'; code=$cisB64}
  )){
    $p='{"client_info":{"name":"1C","version":"8.3","id":"'+$id+'","token":"admin"},"codes":["'+$pair.code+'"]}'
    Write-AsciiNoBom 'C:\Users\Public\chk-body.json' $p
    $code=cmd /c "curl.exe -sk -m 90 -o C:\Users\Public\chk-out.txt -w `"%{http_code}`" -X POST https://127.0.0.1:51401/api/v2/codes/check -H `"Content-Type: application/json`" --data-binary @C:\Users\Public\chk-body.json"
    $out=Get-Content C:\Users\Public\chk-out.txt -Raw
    L ("$($pair.label) HTTP $code "+$out.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(400,$out.Length)))
  }

  Start-Sleep 2
  Select-String -Path 'C:\ProgramData\ESP\ESM\um\log\esm-cm_00109529762114.log' -Pattern 'km_chk|km_scan|событие успешно|codes/check|isOwner|:true' -EA SilentlyContinue |
    Select -Last 25 | ForEach-Object { L $_.Line.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(250,$_.Line.Length)) }

  # Check sqlite for events / setup status
  if(Get-Command sqlite3 -EA SilentlyContinue){ }
  # use powershell + System.Data.SQLite if available, else python
  python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect(r'C:\ProgramData\ESP\ESM\um\db_00109529762114.db'); print(c.execute(\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\").fetchall()[:40])" 2>$null
}
Remove-PSSession $session

  $gs=[char]29
  $cisPlain = "010460706333805621ABCDEFG${gs}93dGVzdA=="
  $cisB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($cisPlain))
  $id=[guid]::NewGuid().ToString()
  $p='{"client_info":{"name":"1C","version":"8.3","id":"'+$id+'","token":"admin"},"codes":["'+$cisB64+'"]}'
  Write-AsciiNoBom 'C:\Users\Public\chk-body.json' $p
  $code=cmd /c "curl.exe -sk -m 90 -o C:\Users\Public\chk-out.txt -w `"%{http_code}`" -X POST https://127.0.0.1:51401/api/v2/codes/check -H `"Content-Type: application/json`" --data-binary @C:\Users\Public\chk-body.json"
  L "HTTP $code"
  L (Get-Content C:\Users\Public\chk-out.txt -Raw).Substring(0,400)

  Start-Sleep 5
  Select-String -Path $log -Pattern 'km_chk|событие успешно|filtered event code=km' -EA SilentlyContinue |
    Select -Last 20 | ForEach-Object { L $_.Line.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(250,$_.Line.Length)) }
}
Remove-PSSession $session

[Console]::OutputEncoding = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8
$ip='26.41.66.35'
$sec=ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred=New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8',$sec)
$session = New-PSSession -ComputerName $ip -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate
Invoke-Command -Session $session -ScriptBlock {
  function L($m){ Write-Output "[$(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss')] $m" }

  # Parse ibases for Bonомар block via .NET encoding
  $v8i = [IO.File]::ReadAllText('C:\Users\buh\AppData\Roaming\1C\1CEStart\ibases.v8i', [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251))
  $m = [regex]::Match($v8i, '(?s)\[Бономар\].*?(?=\[|$)')
  L '=== ibases [Бономар] ==='
  L $m.Value

  L '=== search older gz logs for real codes/check from 1C ==='
  Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
  $gzs = Get-ChildItem 'C:\ProgramData\ESP\ESM\um\log\esm-cm_00109529762114-*.log.gz' | Sort LastWriteTime -Desc | Select -First 4
  foreach($g in $gzs){
    $tmp = "C:\Users\Public\$($g.BaseName).txt"
    $in = [IO.File]::OpenRead($g.FullName)
    $gz = New-Object IO.Compression.GzipStream($in, [IO.Compression.CompressionMode]::Decompress)
    $out = [IO.File]::Create($tmp)
    $gz.CopyTo($out); $out.Close(); $gz.Close(); $in.Close()
    $hits = Select-String -Path $tmp -Pattern 'Запрос v2:.*"name":"1C"|Запрос v2:.*"name":"1С"|codes/check' -EA SilentlyContinue | Select -First 8
    L ("--- "+$g.Name+" size="+((Get-Item $tmp).Length)+" hits="+@($hits).Count)
    $hits | ForEach-Object { L $_.Line.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(260,$_.Line.Length)) }
    # also count total codes/check
    $cnt = (Select-String -Path $tmp -Pattern 'Получен запрос POST /api/v[12]/codes/check' -EA SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object).Count
    L ("codes/check requests in archive: $cnt")
    # sample any client_info names
    $names = Select-String -Path $tmp -Pattern '"name":"[^"]+"' -EA SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { if($_.Line -match '"name":"([^"]*)"'){ $Matches[1] } } | Group-Object | Sort Count -Desc | Select -First 10
    $names | ForEach-Object { L ("name='$($_.Name)' count=$($_.Count)") }
  }

  L '=== 1C AppData search 51401 (shallow) ==='
  $paths = @(
    'C:\Users\buh\AppData\Roaming\1C\1cv8',
    'C:\Users\buh\AppData\Local\1C\1cv8'
  )
  foreach($p in $paths){
    if(-not (Test-Path $p)){ L "missing $p"; continue }
    L "scan $p"
    Get-ChildItem $p -Directory -EA SilentlyContinue | Select -First 20 Name | ForEach-Object { L (" dir "+$_.Name) }
    # only text-ish small files in top caches
    Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -File -EA SilentlyContinue |
      Where-Object { $_.Length -lt 500kb -and $_.Extension -match '\.(txt|xml|html|htm|json|lst|cfg|v8i)$' } |
      Select -First 200 |
      ForEach-Object {
        $h = Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern '51401|ПИоТ|tspiot|ТСПиОТ|ao-esp|codes/check' -EA SilentlyContinue | Select -First 1
        if($h){ L ("HIT "+$_.FullName); L $h.Line.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(200,$h.Line.Length)) }
      }
  }
}
Remove-PSSession $session

content.text:
По базе **Бономар** картина такая.

**Что открыто сейчас**
- Тонкий клиент `8.5.1.1150`
- `/IBName"Бономар"` → `Srvr=192.168.101.49; Ref=bonomar`
- ТС ПИоТ на ПК живой: `https://127.0.0.1:51401/api/v1/info` → **200**, ККТ `00109529762114`, ИНН `2458016373`

**Интеграция 1С ↔ ТС ПИоТ — не настроена**
- В логах ЕСМ за ~неделю **0** запросов `codes/check` от 1С (до наших ручных тестов сегодня)
- Внешних компонент ESP/ПИоТ в `ExtCompT` **нет**
- Есть другое: `fptr10` (АТОЛ), `ExtraCryptoAPI`, плагин **Контур** — типичный путь ЧЗ не через ПИоТ
- В локальном кэше 1С нет сохранённых настроек на `51401` / «ПИоТ»

**Итог:** ЕСМ/ПИоТ на кассе работают, но **1С Бономар к ним не подключена** — проверки марок из 1С туда не ходят.

Чтобы включить: в Бономар (рабочее место / проверка КМ) прописать ПИоТ `https://127.0.0.1:51401` по инструкции ЕСП для БП 3.0 и сделать тестовую проверку марки — в логе ЕСМ должен появиться `Запрос v2` с `client_info.name=1C`.

Могу расписать точные пункты меню БП 3.0.199 или сразу помочь настроить, если дашь доступ/скрин настроек маркировки в 1С.

input.command:
[Console]::OutputEncoding = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8
$ip='26.41.66.35'
$sec=ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred=New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8',$sec)
$session = New-PSSession -ComputerName $ip -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate
Invoke-Command -Session $session -ScriptBlock {
  function L($m){ Write-Output "[$(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss')] $m" }

  # ATOL 1C component presence + GRPC settings
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files\ATOL\Drivers10\KKT\1Cv83' -EA SilentlyContinue | Select Name,Length | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Drivers10\KKT\1Cv83' -EA SilentlyContinue | Select Name,Length | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String

  # ESM certs for 1C
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\ProgramData\ESP\ESM\um' -Filter '*.crt' -EA SilentlyContinue | ft Name,Length,LastWriteTime -Auto | Out-String
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\ProgramData\esp\esm\um' -Filter '*.crt' -EA SilentlyContinue | ft Name,Length -Auto | Out-String

  # Try COM connectors available
  foreach($prog in @('V83.COMConnector','V85.COMConnector','V82.COMConnector')){
    try { $o=New-Object -ComObject $prog; L "COM OK $prog"; [Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject($o)|Out-Null } catch { L "COM FAIL $prog" }
  }

  # 1C window in session 1
  Get-Process 1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | ft Id,SessionId,MainWindowTitle -Auto | Out-String

  # Dump UI Automation top windows in session 1 via psexec
  $ui=@'
Add-Type -AssemblyName UIAutomationClient
Add-Type -AssemblyName UIAutomationTypes
$log="C:\Users\Public\1c-ui.txt"
function L($m){ Add-Content $log $m }
Remove-Item $log -EA SilentlyContinue
$root=[System.Windows.Automation.AutomationElement]::RootElement
$cond=New-Object System.Windows.Automation.PropertyCondition([System.Windows.Automation.AutomationElement]::ControlTypeProperty,[System.Windows.Automation.ControlType]::Window)
$wins=$root.FindAll([System.Windows.Automation.TreeScope]::Children,$cond)
L ("windows="+$wins.Count)
foreach($w in $wins){
  $n=$w.Current.Name
  if($n -match '1[CС]|Бономар|Бухгал|Предприят'){ L ("WIN: $n") }
  elseif($n){ L ("win: "+$n.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(80,$n.Length))) }
}
'@
  Set-Content 'C:\Users\Public\1c-ui.ps1' -Value $ui -Encoding UTF8
  & 'C:\Users\Public\PsExec.exe' -accepteula -i 1 -d powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:\Users\Public\1c-ui.ps1 2>&1 | Out-Null
  Start-Sleep 4
  Get-Content 'C:\Users\Public\1c-ui.txt' -EA SilentlyContinue
}
Remove-PSSession $session

AVOID RABBIT HOLES:

2. IMPORTANT: If four attempts fail or progress stalls, stop acting and report what you observed, what blocked progress, and the most likely next step.
3. Prefer gathering evidence over brute force. If the page is confusing, use browser_snapshot, browser_take_screenshot, or CDP inspection before trying more actions.
4. If you encounter a blocker such as login, passkey/manual user interaction, permissions, captchas, destructive confirmations, missing data, or an unexpected state, stop and report it instead of improvising repeated actions.
5. Do not get stuck in wait-action-wait loops. Every retry should be justified by something newly observed.

CRITICAL - Lock/unlock workflow:
1. browser_lock requires an existing browser tab - you CANNOT call browser_lock with action: "lock" before browser_navigate
2. Correct order: browser_navigate -> browser_lock({ action: "lock" }) -> (interactions) -> browser_lock({ action: "unlock" })
3. If a browser tab already exists (check with browser_tabs list), call browser_lock with action: "lock" FIRST before any interactions
4. Only call browser_lock with action: "unlock" when completely done with ALL browser operations for this turn

IMPORTANT - Waiting strategy:
When waiting for page changes, prefer short CDP polling loops with Runtime.evaluate, DOM queries, Page lifecycle signals, or browser_snapshot checks rather than a single long wait.

CDP USAGE:
- Use browser_cdp with a DevTools Protocol method and params object, for example Runtime.evaluate, DOM.getDocument, CSS.getComputedStyleForNode, Profiler.start/stop, Performance.getMetrics, Log.enable, and Network.enable.
- Do not use browser_cdp with CDP Input.* methods. They are denied because they are focus-sensitive in Electron webviews and can route input to Cursor UI instead of the browser page.
- Use browser_click, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, and browser_drag for clicks, typing, filling inputs, selecting options, keyboard actions, scrolling, and drag-and-drop.
- Use Runtime.evaluate for advanced DOM-scoped interactions that the dedicated browser tools do not cover.
- For profiling, call Profiler.enable, Profiler.start, reproduce the behavior, then Profiler.stop. The profile is saved to a file and returned as a log_file; read that file only when you need to inspect details.
- For JavaScript evaluation, prefer Runtime.evaluate with returnByValue when possible.
- Some browser-wide or sensitive CDP methods are denied, especially cookie, storage, permission, download, target-management, filesystem-backed file-input commands, system-level commands, and CDP navigation/history navigation commands.
- Large CDP responses are saved to files instead of being inlined. Prefer using the returned file path over immediately stuffing large payloads into context; read focused sections only when needed.

VISION:
- browser_take_screenshot attaches an image result that the model can inspect. CDP Page.captureScreenshot returns data inside JSON and should not replace browser_take_screenshot when visual verification is needed.

NOTES:
- browser_snapshot returns snapshot YAML and is the main source of truth for page structure.
- Refs are opaque handles tied to the latest browser_snapshot for that tab.
- Iframe content is not accessible - only elements outside iframes can be interacted with.
- When you stop to report a blocker, include the current page, the target you were trying to reach, the blocker you observed, and the best next action. If the blocker requires manual user interaction, ask the user to take over at that point rather than assuming it in advance." />
</mcp_meta_tool_servers>

You also have access to MCP resources via `FetchMcpResource`.
If a relevant server is marked as needing authentication, or if an MCP tool call fails with an authentication/authorization error, call `mcp_auth` for that server, then inspect that server again and retry the original request if appropriate. Do not call `mcp_auth` just because it is listed, and do not repeatedly call it if authentication did not fix the failure. Do not call `mcp_auth` in parallel; authenticate only one server at a time.

$sec=ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred=New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8',$sec)

# Instruction file as UTF8 BOM via base64
$txt = @"
=== Настройка 1С Бономар <-> ТС ПИоТ (ЕСМ) ===

ESM на BUH-5 уже готов:
- HTTPS ПИоТ: 127.0.0.1:51401 (ФН 7380440903390173)
- GRPC АТОЛ: 4041
- ЛМ ЧЗ: 127.0.0.1:5995 (admin / admin)
- Сертификаты ESP установлены в доверенные корневые

В 1С (под КупрееваМЮ):

1) Администрирование -> Интеграция с ИС МП (обувь, одежда, табак...)
2) Настройки подключения к ТС ПИоТ -> Создать
   - Протокол: HTTPS
   - Адрес: 127.0.0.1
   - Порт: 51401
   - Номер ФН: 7380440903390173
   - Организация и Рабочее место: ваши
   -> должно быть: Подключение настроено корректно -> Записать и закрыть

3) Настройка подключения к ЛМ ЧЗ (там же)
   - Адрес: 127.0.0.1
   - Порт: 5995
   - Логин/пароль: admin / admin
   - Выполнять обмен на локальном компьютере

4) Администрирование -> Подключаемое оборудование -> ККТ
   - Обновить драйвер из: C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Drivers10\KKT\1Cv83
   - Параметры подключения -> Порт сервера GRPC = 4041
   - Отключить обновление драйвера с Портала 1С:ИТС

Если пункта ТС ПИоТ нет — нужен патч EF_00_00835923 (для БП от 3.0.188; у вас 3.0.199 обычно уже встроен).

Проверка: пробить марку в чеке; в логе ESM должен появиться Запрос v2 с client_info.name=1C
"@
# Build remotely with UTF8
$b64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($txt))

Invoke-Command -ComputerName $ip -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  param($b64)
  function L($m){ Write-Output "[$(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss')] $m" }
  $bytes=[Convert]::FromBase64String($b64)
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\Public\PIOT-1C-SETUP.txt', $bytes)
  Copy-Item 'C:\Users\Public\PIOT-1C-SETUP.txt' 'C:\Users\buh\Desktop\PIOT-1C-SETUP.txt' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue
  # ensure 1C running
  $p=Get-Process 1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue
  if(-not $p){
    L "1C not running - start"
    & 'C:\Users\Public\PsExec.exe' -accepteula -i 1 -d 'C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.5.1.1150\bin\1cv8c.exe' ENTERPRISE '/IBNameБономар' 2>&1 | Out-Null
    Start-Sleep 5
  }
  Get-Process 1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { L ("1cv8c pid=$($_.Id) session=$($_.SessionId)") }
  # fptr keepalive
  if(-not (Get-Process fptr10_t -EA SilentlyContinue)){
    L "start fptr10_t"
    & 'C:\Users\Public\PsExec.exe' -accepteula -i 1 -d 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Drivers10\KKT\bin\fptr10_t.exe' 2>&1 | Out-Null
  }
  Get-Process fptr10_t -EA SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { L ("fptr pid=$($_.Id)") }
  L "instr -> C:\Users\Public\PIOT-1C-SETUP.txt"
} -ArgumentList $b64

content.text:
Учётка **КупрееваМЮ / 1423** принята (неверный пароль сразу отсекается), но **COM-подключение к Бономар зависает** — через API 1С настройку не записать (типично для отсутствующей лицензии «COM-соединитель» или запрета внешнего соединения на сервере).

**Со стороны ЕСМ на BUH-5 всё готово:**
- ПИоТ `https://127.0.0.1:51401` — OK, ФН `7380440903390173`
- GRPC `4041`, ЛМ ЧЗ `5995` (admin/admin)
- 1С снова запущена, инструкция на рабочем столе: `PIOT-1C-SETUP.txt`

**Сделайте в открытой 1С (2–3 минуты):**

1. **Администрирование → Интеграция с ИС МП → Настройки подключения к ТС ПИоТ**  
   HTTPS, `127.0.0.1`, порт **51401**, ФН **7380440903390173**, организация и РМ → Записать

2. Там же **ЛМ ЧЗ**: `127.0.0.1:5995`, admin/admin

3. В карточке ККТ: обновить драйвер из `C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Drivers10\KKT\1Cv83`, **GRPC = 4041**

После этого напишите — проверю по логу ESM, что запрос идёт от 1С (`client_info.name=1C`).
